# MOMENTUM

> Stake your behavior. Recover your money. An AI-powered behavioral consistency engine where real money rides on what you actually do — and ACE intervenes before decay turns into disengagement.

MOMENTUM is a personal accountability app for people who have tried every productivity tool and watched novelty fade. Users put a monthly stake (500–5,000 SEK) on the line, log behavior across five domains (physical, mental, social, self-regulation, nourishment), and recover money through consistent action. Whatever isn't recovered goes to a chosen charity. ACE — the consistency engine — watches engagement patterns and intervenes early.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What MOMENTUM is, how stakes work, and the role of ACE.
- [Sign in](/login): Email/password and Google sign-in for new and returning users.
